domain.title: Jira site domain
domain.description: The subdomain of your Jira Cloud site. Example: for https://mycompany.atlassian.net, enter 'mycompany'.

email.title: Atlassian account email
email.description: Email address of the Atlassian account that owns the API token.

apiToken.title: Atlassian API token
apiToken.description: Atlassian API token for Jira Cloud. The server will convert this into the required Basic auth header.

cloudId.title: Jira Cloud ID
cloudId.description: Your Jira Cloud resource ID. You can discover it by calling GET https://api.atlassian.com/oauth/token/accessible-resources with your OAuth access token.

token.title: OAuth access token
token.description: OAuth 2.0 access token with Jira scopes (read:jira-work, write:jira-work, read:jira-user).
